comments.text: This looks hard, even if one assumes powerful conjectures such as the prime tuples conjecture. The key values of $n$ which would contribute to this lim sup are the extreme points of the convex hull of the graph $\{ (n,p_n): n \in {\mathbf N} \}$ of the primes, but this is expected to be a very sparse set and so even the prime tuples conjecture doesn't tell us much about what happens near those points.
